highlights.title: sqlite-vec Integration
highlights.description: Load sqlite-vec extension at runtime, create vec_messages virtual table (cosine distance) and add KNN search via MATCH operator to the local search engine.

highlights.title: EmbeddingService
highlights.description: Provider-agnostic embedding abstraction supporting OpenAI text-embedding-3-small, Ollama nomic-embed-text and Cohere with incremental batch vectorization.

highlights.title: Hybrid FTS5 + Vector Search
highlights.description: Combine keyword (FTS5) and semantic (KNN) results with Reciprocal Rank Fusion for relevance-ranked hybrid queries.

highlights.title: semantic_search MCP Tool
highlights.description: Add semantic_search tool to the AI agent MCP server for meaning-based queries — foundation for RAG in content generation pipelines.
